title: Paxton-Trump White House meeting puts Texas Senate race in focus
shortDescription: President Donald Trump met with Texas Senate candidate Ken Paxton at the White House to discuss the upcoming election vs. James Talarico in November.

title: Takeaways from primary day elections
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's GOP winning streak came to an end in Iowa, while Democrats made historic nominations in New Mexico.

title: Trump says he'd like to meet Iran's supreme leader. US, Iran trade strikes.
shortDescription: The latest clash between U.S. and Iranian forces came late Tuesday. Both sides said they were responding to aggression from the other.

title: Montana election results: Latest on races for House, Senate
shortDescription: Montana primaries stage nominees for November midterms.

title: South Dakota election results: Latest on races for House, Senate
shortDescription: South Dakota voters advanced candidates to the November midterms.

title: New Mexico election results: Latest on governor, House, Senate primaries
shortDescription: New Mexico voters set ballots for November midterms.

title: New Jersey election results: Latest on primary races for House, Senate
shortDescription: New Jersey primaries set the ballots for November midterms.

title: California election results: Latest on governor, LA mayor primaries
shortDescription: The candidates are set for dozens of November midterm elections across California.

title: Iowa election results: Latest on races for governor, House, Senate
shortDescription: Here's the latest on Iowa's gubernatorial, House and Senate primaries.

title: Trump's primary winning streak screeches to halt: Election takeaways
shortDescription: Democrats nominated history-makers for Senate in Iowa and governor in New Mexico, while Trump's GOP primary winning streak came to an end.

title: Who is Josh Turek? Former Paralympian aims to flip Iowa Senate seat
shortDescription: The former U.S. men's wheelchair basketball player won gold medals and now the Democratic nomination for Iowa's Senate seat.

title: Jill Biden: No aides warned of Joe Biden’s health before 2024 debate
shortDescription: Jill Biden told “The View” on June 2 that no one had approached her with concerns regarding her husband's health before the 2024 presidential debate.

title: Trump rolls out voluntary AI review plan
shortDescription: President Trump signed an executive order creating a voluntary federal review process for advanced artificial intelligence models.

title: Latest approval rating poll shows new low for Trump
shortDescription: A record-high number of Americans say they disapprove of Trump’s time in the White House. See Economist/YouGov's latest approval rating poll.

title: Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund won't move forward, Justice Department says
shortDescription: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said the Justice Department won't move forward with President Donald Trump's nearly $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization fund."
